# [OS-01] Apache-2.0 + open PDK (SKY130A) reproducible build

> Plan ID `OS-01` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

✅ **Done.** `LICENSE` is Apache-2.0; `info.yaml` declares SKY130A;
`.github/workflows/gds.yaml` runs OpenLane2 → SKY130A in CI.

## Evidence in this repo

- `LICENSE` — Apache-2.0.
- `info.yaml` — `tinytapeout_version: SKY 26b`; module list pinned.
- `.github/workflows/gds.yaml` — OpenLane2 / SKY130A flow.
- `.github/workflows/test.yaml` — `iverilog`, R-SI-1, cocotb suite.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Apache-2.0 LICENSE present.
- [x] Open PDK declared (`info.yaml`).
- [x] CI runs the GDS flow against the open PDK on every push.

## R5 honesty

This issue covers the **license and PDK posture**, not licensability
of every dependency the repo pulls. Anyone shipping a derivative
should re-audit the dependency graph.
